behavior_summary: Provides event handlers for a Mentar sorcerer-type object that delegate all meaningful gameplay behavior to centralized sorcerer and spell-combat routines rather than implementing logic inline.

On U8P_MENTAR::look (examine), use, enterFastArea, leaveFastArea, and cast events the script prepares a context and an object info block, marks/excludes the object from normal processing, then spawns an external handler to perform the actual behavior.

The script forwards an implicit pid, a context pointer, an object info/state block, and (for cast) a uword parameter to the external routines; it then checks the spawned return value with an 'implies' test before suspending/returning.
notable_control_flow: Each event handler follows a repeatable sequence: push context ([BP+06h]) and object info (push indirect 02h bytes) -> set info / process exclude -> push pid and other args -> spawn external routine -> free temporary string (if used) -> pop/spawn retval -> implies check -> suspend/return.
Handlers do not perform local game-logic branching; they act as thin wrappers that forward to SORCERER or SPELCMBT modules.
The 'cast' handler forwards a cast parameter (uword) in addition to the standard context/info/pid stack used by other events.
open_questions: The exact binary layout and semantics of the 'object info' pushed via 'push indirect 02h bytes' is not explicit; it appears to be an object instance or info block but its fields are unknown (inferred).

Exact parameter order and full signature (types) of the external routines SORCERER::039C, SORCERER::05EC, SORCERER::258C, SORCERER::25D2, and SPELCMBT::084D are inferred from calling convention but not documented concretely.
Meaning of any 'info id' set by the 'set info' opcode prior to spawning the handlers is not shown in the disassembly and is therefore only inferred as a processing flag/state marker.

main_function.name: U8P_MENTAR::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the 'U8P_MENTAR::look' (examine) event for the Mentar object by preparing context and object info, excluding the object from processing, and spawning a centralized sorcerer routine (SORCERER::039C) to perform the actual presentation/logic.

function_map.name: U8P_MENTAR::look
function_map.role: Main event handler for examine/U8P_MENTAR::look; packages context and object info and spawns SORCERER::039C to implement the behavior.

function_map.name: U8P_MENTAR::use
function_map.role: Event handler for 'use' that delegates to SORCERER::05EC after preparing context and object info.

function_map.name: U8P_MENTAR::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Triggered when an actor enters the object's fast-area trigger; delegates to SORCERER::258C.

function_map.name: U8P_MENTAR::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Triggered when an actor leaves the object's fast-area trigger; delegates to SORCERER::25D2.

function_map.name: U8P_MENTAR::cast
function_map.role: Handles spell-cast/combat event by forwarding the cast parameter and context to SPELCMBT::084D.

function_map.name: SORCERER::039C
function_map.role: External routine that implements the U8P_MENTAR::look/examine behavior for sorcerer-type objects (receives pid, identifier 'Mentar', context, object info).

function_map.name: SORCERER::05EC
function_map.role: External routine that implements 'use' behavior for sorcerer-type objects.

function_map.name: SORCERER::258C
function_map.role: External handler invoked on fast-area entry for sorcerer-type objects.

function_map.name: SORCERER::25D2
function_map.role: External handler invoked on fast-area exit for sorcerer-type objects.

function_map.name: SPELCMBT::084D
function_map.role: External spell-combat handler invoked by the cast event; receives the cast parameter plus pid/context/object info.

external_calls.purpose: Delegate presentation/logic for examining the Mentar object (passes implicit pid, 'Mentar' identifier, context, and object info).
Delegate the 'use' event behavior for Mentar (passes pid, 'Mentar', context, object info).
Handle an actor entering the object's trigger area by delegating to a centralized sorcerer area-entry routine.
Handle an actor leaving the object's trigger area by delegating to a centralized sorcerer area-exit routine.
Forward the cast parameter and context to the spell-combat handler to perform spell-specific behavior for this object.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides event handlers for a Mentar sorcerer-type object that delegate all meaningful gameplay behavior to centralized sorcerer and spell-combat routines rather than implementing logic inline.
